name: Nino Chavez Blueprint
tagline: Brownfield audit + redesign of ninochavez.co — reframed as Nino Chavez ⊕ studio surface. Stage 4: Prototype (4 pages, 3 persona flows).

flows.label: Peer Architect arrival
flows.summary: P1 lands on home via referral or Signal Dispatch post → scans capability + live signals + receipts → opens /colophon to verify methodology depth → bookmarks or RSS-subscribes. Authority verification path.

flows.label: Prospective Client arrival
flows.summary: P2 lands on home via LinkedIn or referral → scans capability sentence in practitioner language → clicks /speaking to verify legitimacy → returns to home → clicks Schedule a conversation. Commercial-trust verification path.

flows.label: Conference Circuit arrival
flows.summary: P3 lands directly on /speaking via referral or search → reads bio variants + scans topic list + downloads headshot → checks /now for currency signal → emails with subject template pre-filled.
